description: Fix 32 ADR violations found by hex analyze --adr-compliance. Grouped by ADR and tier to maintain hexagonal boundary discipline.

tasks.name: Replace innerHTML in scaffold-service.ts:267
tasks.description: scaffold-service.ts uses innerHTML to inject template content. Replace with DOM APIs or textContent. This is in usecases layer which should not do DOM manipulation at all — move to a primary adapter.

tasks.name: Replace innerHTML in cli-adapter.ts:285,1351
tasks.description: cli-adapter.ts uses innerHTML in two places. Replace with textContent or createElement DOM APIs. These are primary adapter code so env access is fine, but innerHTML with external data is a security risk.

phases.name: Fix std::env::var in non-adapter Rust code (ADR-001 domain purity)

tasks.name: Remove env var access from state.rs:56
tasks.description: state.rs reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY directly via std::env::var. Move to AppState constructor parameter — caller (lib.rs/main.rs) should inject it.

tasks.name: Remove env var access from agent_manager.rs:180
tasks.description: agent_manager.rs reads env vars directly. Accept via constructor config struct instead.

tasks.name: Remove env var access from spacetime_launcher.rs:570
tasks.description: spacetime_launcher reads env vars for SpacetimeDB config. Accept via config parameter.

tasks.name: Remove env var access from adrs.rs:37 and files.rs:17
tasks.description: Route handlers read env vars for project root discovery. Accept root path from request context or state.

tasks.name: Remove env var access from secrets.rs:180
tasks.description: secrets route reads env var directly. Inject via AppState.

phases.name: Migrate state.projects reads to SpacetimeDB (ADR-039)
phases.gate: cargo build -p hex-nexus && cargo test -p hex-nexus --lib

tasks.name: Create resolve_project_path utility in routes
tasks.description: Create a shared utility function that resolves project paths by querying SpacetimeDB via state_port first, falling back to the REST HashMap. All route handlers should use this instead of direct state.projects.read().

tasks.name: Migrate query.rs (9 violations)
tasks.description: query.rs has 6 route handlers all doing state.projects.read(). Refactor to use the shared resolve_project_path utility.

tasks.name: Migrate analysis.rs (3 violations)
tasks.description: analysis.rs has 3 handlers doing direct project lookup. Refactor to shared utility.

tasks.name: Migrate browse.rs, commands.rs, push.rs (5 violations)
tasks.description: browse.rs (2), commands.rs (1), push.rs (2) all read from state.projects directly.

tasks.name: Migrate git.rs (1 violation)
tasks.description: git.rs already has resolve_project_path but it reads from HashMap. Update to use the shared SpacetimeDB-first utility.

tasks.name: Replace direct call_reducer in config_sync.rs
tasks.description: config_sync.rs calls SpacetimeDB reducers directly (4 violations). Refactor to use HexFlo coordination API as the abstraction layer.

tasks.name: Fix usecases importing composition-root
tasks.description: scaffold-service.ts imports from composition-root.js which violates hex boundary rules (usecases may only import from domain/ and ports/). Extract the needed functionality into a port.

tasks.name: Run full analysis and verify 0 errors, 0 warnings
tasks.description: Run hex analyze and confirm all ADR violations are resolved. If any remain, create follow-up tasks.
